title: TerminalSession
description: Artifact contract for a terminal session (e.g. TurtleTerm). Records the session envelope, device binding, and transcript reference. The transcript itself must be stored as a separate artifact and referenced by contentRef. TerminalSession artifacts map to WorkspaceOperation kind=terminal-command.

cwd.description: Working directory at session start. Must be within an allowed filesystem root.

exitCode.description: Shell exit code at session end.

transcriptRef.description: Content-addressable reference (e.g. sha256:<hex>) to the session transcript artifact.

commandIds.description: Ordered list of TerminalCommand IDs executed within this session.

auditEnabled.description: Whether session transcript audit was active. Sessions with auditEnabled=false must not be used as operation evidence.

redacted.description: Whether a DiagnosticRedaction pass has been applied to the transcript.
